{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Scourge Warrens
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Scourge Warrens]] are underground factories used by the [[Iron Legion]] to infest planets.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Scourge Warrens]] killed thousands of people across a continent in a half hour.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
